svg.title: KubeSentinel Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture diagram showing KubeSentinel's components: CLI, Static Policy Engine, Runtime Monitor, AI Behavioral Analyzer, LLM Triage Staging Vault, Forensic Vault, Report Generator, and Gemini Enrichment.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does KubeSentinel scan Kubernetes manifests?')
sendPrompt('How does KubeSentinel ingest Falco events?')
sendPrompt('What commands does the KubeSentinel CLI support?')
sendPrompt('What does the KubeSentinel Static Policy Engine check?')
sendPrompt('How does the KubeSentinel runtime monitor work?')
sendPrompt('How does the KubeSentinel AI anomaly detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does the KubeSentinel LLM triage staging vault work?')
sendPrompt('What does Gemini enrichment add to KubeSentinel?')
sendPrompt('How does the KubeSentinel forensic vault store evidence?')
sendPrompt('What report formats does KubeSentinel produce?')
